title: Transgender Amendment Bill gets Presidential assent amid protests
description: The Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, which introduced sweeping changes to the legal framework governing the recognition, rights and protection of transgender persons, has received the assent of the President of India. The Bill was passed by both houses of Parliament last week. The controversial Bill, now officially in force as an Act, amends the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act, 2019.
